moments.title: FIFA World Cup Final
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup concludes tomorrow with the final match in the United States, marking the end of the first 48-team tournament hosted by three nations.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: One more sleep! The FIFA World Cup 2026 final is tomorrow. Who are you backing to lift the trophy?

angles.name: Tournament Recap
angles.copy: It's been a World Cup of firsts: 48 teams, three host nations, and a tournament that's flown by! What's been your highlight ahead of tomorrow's final?

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: The London Athletics Meet, a key event in the 2026 athletics season featuring world-class track and field, is happening today at the London Stadium.

angles.name: Live Athletics
angles.copy: World-class action hits London today! The London Athletics Meet is live at the Olympic Stadium. Who are you watching out for?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: Right here in London, the capital is buzzing with the Athletics Meet! Get down to the London Stadium or tune in for the best of track and field.

moments.title: Aquatics GB Next Gen Championships
moments.blurb: The Aquatics GB Next Gen Championships continue today at Ponds Forge in Sheffield, showcasing future swimming and para-swimming talent until July 22nd.

angles.name: Future Stars
angles.copy: Sheffield is hosting the Aquatics GB Next Gen Championships! Catch the UK's rising swimming and para-swimming stars in action all weekend at Ponds Forge.

angles.name: Poolside Action
angles.copy: Dive into the Aquatics GB Next Gen Championships! Seven days of intense swimming and para-swimming continue in Sheffield. Who's making a splash?

moments.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games Start
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games kick off in Glasgow on July 23rd, bringing over 3,000 athletes from 74 nations to Scotland for 11 days of competition.

angles.name: Glasgow Ready
angles.copy: Glasgow, are you ready? The Commonwealth Games begin on Thursday! 11 days of incredible sport are about to take over the city. #Glasgow2026

angles.name: Games Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on! The Commonwealth Games start in Glasgow this week. Who's excited to see the best of the Commonwealth compete?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold UK #1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' remains at number one on the Official UK Singles Chart for an incredible 57th week, setting a new record for a British act.

angles.name: Record Breakers
angles.copy: 57 weeks at #1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still dominating the UK Singles Chart with 'Rein Me In'. A massive achievement!

angles.name: Chart Reign
angles.copy: No stopping them! 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender & Olivia Dean continues its historic run at UK #1. What's your favourite lyric from the track?

moments.title: Oasis' 'Wonderwall' back in UK Top 2
moments.blurb: Oasis' iconic track 'Wonderwall' has made a huge climb to number two on the Official UK Singles Chart this week, proving its enduring popularity.

angles.name: Nineties Anthem
angles.copy: It's back! Oasis' 'Wonderwall' has shot up to #2 on the Official UK Singles Chart. Proof that some songs just never fade. What a tune!

angles.name: Timeless Rock
angles.copy: From the 90s to now, 'Wonderwall' is still a force! Oasis climbing to #2 on the singles chart is incredible. What's your favourite Oasis track?

moments.title: 'Three Lions' surges up UK Chart
moments.blurb: Baddiel, Skinner & Lightning Seeds' 'Three Lions' has seen a massive surge on the Official UK Singles Chart, climbing to number three amid World Cup fever.

angles.name: Football's Coming Home
angles.copy: It's coming home! 'Three Lions' is back in the UK Top 3 on the Official Singles Chart. Can it make it all the way to #1?

angles.name: Chart Climber
angles.copy: The World Cup might be ending, but 'Three Lions' is still climbing! What a classic track to hear everywhere right now.

moments.title: Brian May turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 19th.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday tomorrow to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Queen's Legacy
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate the birthday of Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, turning 79! Send him your well wishes!

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: The legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Smooth Sounds
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the incredible Carlos Santana on Monday! What's your go-to Santana track?

angles.name: Guitar Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating 79 years of rock and roll magic! Carlos Santana's birthday is Monday. What an absolute legend!

moments.title: Don Henley turns 79
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and singer Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to Don Henley of The Eagles on Wednesday! Which Eagles song is your favourite?

angles.name: Hotel California Hitmaker
angles.copy: The voice behind so many classics! Don Henley turns 79 on Wednesday. What an incredible career.

moments.title: Selena Gomez turns 34
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to the amazing Selena Gomez on Wednesday! What's your favourite Selena track?

angles.name: Birthday Wishes
angles.copy: From Disney star to global sensation, Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday this Wednesday! Send your love!

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 56
moments.blurb: Global icon Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 56th birthday on July 24th.

angles.name: J-Lo's Day
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the one and only Jennifer Lopez on Thursday! Get ready to celebrate with her biggest hits!

angles.name: Dance Floor Queen
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring career of Jennifer Lopez, turning 56 this Thursday! What's your favourite J-Lo banger to get you moving?

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday. What's your favourite Rolling Stones track?

angles.name: Ageless Icon
angles.copy: 83 years young and still a rock icon! Happy Birthday on Sunday to the incredible Mick Jagger.

moments.title: Roger Taylor turns 77
moments.blurb: Queen drummer Roger Taylor celebrates his 77th birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Another Queen legend celebrating this week! Roger Taylor turns 77 on Sunday. What's your favourite Queen drum beat?

angles.name: Happy Birthday Roger
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to Queen's phenomenal drummer, Roger Taylor, who turns 77 this Sunday!

moments.title: Jacoby Shaddix turns 50
moments.blurb: Papa Roach frontman Jacoby Shaddix celebrates his 50th birthday on July 28th.

angles.name: Nu-Metal Milestone
angles.copy: Cut my life into pieces, it's Jacoby Shaddix's 50th birthday on Tuesday! Happy Birthday to the Papa Roach legend!

angles.name: 50 Years of Rock
angles.copy: Can you believe Papa Roach's Jacoby Shaddix turns 50 on Tuesday? Time flies when you're making iconic rock anthems!

moments.title: UK Summer School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays begin for many children in England this week (July 23rd-28th), with Scotland and Wales already enjoying their break.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: It's official! Summer holidays are here for many across the UK this week. What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Welsh Summer Starts
angles.copy: The summer holidays are in full swing across Wales! Wishing all our listeners a fantastic break. What adventures are you having?

angles.name: Devon Summer Fun
angles.copy: School's out for summer in Devon! Whether you're staying local or heading away, have an amazing summer holiday.

moments.title: Reading & Leeds Festival Line-up Buzz
moments.blurb: Reading & Leeds Festivals (August 27-30) are generating buzz with their 2026 line-up featuring headliners like Charli XCX, Dave, Florence + The Machine, and Fontaines D.C., with tickets on sale.

angles.name: Festival Planning
angles.copy: Already planning your August Bank Holiday? Reading & Leeds Festivals have dropped their huge line-up, with Charli XCX, Dave, Florence + The Machine heading up the stages!

angles.name: Who's Going?
angles.copy: Reading & Leeds Festivals are on the horizon! With rock giants and new talent, which acts are you most excited to see?
